title: Using shell interpreter when executing OS commands is security sensitive
description: Avoid using the shell interpreter for executing operating system commands, as it poses a security risk.
message: Using the shell interpreter for executing operating system commands is insecure.
recommendation: Use a library like subprocess or shutil to execute OS commands.

noncompliant.description: Using os.system with shell=True is insecure.

why_is_this_an_issue: The shell interpreter can be manipulated to execute arbitrary commands, which can lead to security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Use a library like subprocess or shutil to execute OS commands.
